rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: WMI Reconnaissance

rules.rule_text:
title: WMI Reconnaissance
id: 8a450075-e74f-4b19-9efa-b62a53f85bf8
status: experimental
description: "Reconnaissance is harder to detect because it looks very similar to\
  \ normal admin behavior. \nEven so, we detect a relatively high volume of adversaries\
  \ leveraging WMI to quickly gather \ndomain information such as users, groups, or\
  \ computers in the domain. The following may help \nyou detect related activity.\
  \ Part of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-management-instrumentation/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1047
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1087
- attack.t1087.002
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \wmic.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - \ldap
    - ntdomain
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
